message:
feat(types,core): add trace/decision/policy ID propagation to Cx context (bd-2g5.6)

Thread TraceId, DecisionId, PolicyId through the Cx capability context
and wire all Connection operations to use per-operation derived contexts
with monotonic IDs from the observability crate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -609,7 +609,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-2g5.4","title":"Left-Right wait-free reads for metadata","description":"Left-Right sync (§14.3): Wait-free reads on any data structure via dual-instance swapping. For metadata structures (schema cache, config) that must never block readers. Writer updates shadow copy, then atomically swaps. Tracing: span 'left_right_swap' with fields swap_count, pending_writes, readers_active. Log level: DEBUG swap events, TRACE reader entry/exit. Metric: fsqlite_leftright_swaps_total counter, fsqlite_leftright_readers_active gauge.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Wait-free reads verified (no reader blocks). 2. Linearizable under 32 readers + 1 writer. 3. Memory overhead = 2x data structure size. 4. Swap latency < 1us.  8. Unit/property test coverage for this bead is mandatory, including deterministic seeds and explicit invariant checks. 9. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script must validate integrated behavior with replay instructions and archived artifacts. 10. Structured logging/metrics validation is required: trace/run/scenario IDs, timing, counters, and actionable failure context must be present and CI-verified.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:02:26.461924635Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T00:37:13.210750830Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien","alien-pass-2026-02-13","concurrency","ev-gated","frankensqlite","impl"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2g5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2g5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2g5.5","title":"TEST: Cross-process crash safety, RCU/seqlock correctness","description":"Test bead: Cross-process concurrency correctness. (1) TxnSlots crash: kill random processes, verify slot reclamation and no orphaned locks (100 crash cycles). (2) RCU correctness: loom model checking for read/write interleaving. (3) Seqlock: verify no torn reads under concurrent writes (ThreadSanitizer + stress). (4) Left-Right: verify linearizability with 32 readers + 1 writer. (5) Multi-process stress: 8 processes, mixed read/write, verify MVCC correctness across process boundaries. Acceptance: zero torn reads, zero orphan slots, linearizable Left-Right.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Zero orphaned slots after 100 crash cycles. 2. RCU loom passes. 3. No torn seqlock reads. 4. Left-Right linearizable with 32R+1W.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:02:26.515212230Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T04:39:59.366438233Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","concurrency","ev-gated","frankensqlite","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2g5.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2g5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2g5.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2g5.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2g5.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2g5.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-14T04:39:59.366370116Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2g5.5.1","title":"Cross-process crash harness and verification script for bd-2g5.5","description":"Create the missing executable harness for bd-2g5.5 cross-process crash-safety claims: deterministic multi-process crash/recovery loops, slot reclamation checks, seqlock torn-read detection, and Left-Right linearizability assertions. Add a dedicated integration test (fsqlite-harness path) plus scripts/verify_bd_2g5_5_cross_process.sh for reproducible CI/local validation. Require detailed structured logging so failures can be triaged by crash point, process role, and invariant class.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue structured acceptance_criteria field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Harness test covers deterministic multi-process crash cycles, slot reclamation, seqlock torn-read checks, and Left-Right linearizability assertions with reproducible seeds. 2. Unit/property tests validate crash-injection state transitions, invariant evaluation logic, and false-positive resistance. 3. Deterministic end-to-end verification script (scripts/verify_bd_2g5_5_cross_process.sh) runs full scenario matrix and emits replay commands plus artifact bundles. 4. Structured logging/metrics include trace_id/run_id/scenario_id/process_role/crash_point/timing and actionable failure diagnostics, with CI schema-conformance checks.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-14T04:39:58.644073275Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-16T04:54:08.050345383Z","closed_at":"2026-02-16T04:54:08.050321248Z","close_reason":"Validated cross-process harness/tests and fixed verify_bd_2g5_5_cross_process.sh path/replay parsing; rch check+tests pass and verifier JSON reports matrix_complete=true schema_errors=0","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["concurrency","e2e","ev-gated","frankensqlite","test"]}

### Summary
Added TraceId, DecisionId, and PolicyId propagation to the Cx capability context.
Wired through Connection operations so every pager/WAL/btree call carries
trace context for end-to-end observability.

### Changes

**`crates/fsqlite-types/src/cx.rs`**
- Added `trace_id: u64`, `decision_id: u64`, `policy_id: u64` fields to `Cx<Caps>` struct
- All derivation methods propagate IDs: `clone()`, `restrict()`, `scope_with_budget()`,
  `cleanup_scope()`, `create_child()`, `retype()`
- New builder methods: `with_trace_context()`, `with_decision_id()`, `with_policy_id()`
- New accessors: `trace_id()`, `decision_id()`, `policy_id()`
- 12 new tests covering all propagation paths

**`crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs`**
- Added `root_cx: Cx` field to `Connection` struct — initialized with `next_trace_id()` at open
- Added `root_cx: Cx` field to `PreparedStatement` — inherited from Connection at prepare time
- Added `op_cx()` helper: derives per-operation context with fresh `next_decision_id()`
- Replaced all 15 production `Cx::new()` calls with `self.op_cx()` / `conn.op_cx()`
- Methods updated: close_internal, ensure_autocommit_txn_mode, resolve_autocommit_txn,
  with_pager_write_txn, execute_begin, execute_commit, execute_rollback,
  execute_savepoint, execute_release, pragma_wal_checkpoint, pragma_database_header,
  apply_journal_mode_to_pager, reload_memdb_from_pager (in open)
- 3 new integration tests

### Test Results
- 46 cx tests passing (12 new, 34 existing)
- 828 fsqlite-core tests passing (3 new, net +1 improvement over baseline)
- All quality gates green: cargo check, fmt
","created_at":"2026-02-17T23:46:08Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2g5.6.1","title":"Cx propagation telemetry bridge and regression gate","description":"Extend observability plumbing so bd-2g5.6 can prove Cx propagation guarantees: add explicit telemetry in crates/fsqlite-observability and connection/transaction paths for propagation failures, trace linkage, and cancellation cleanup outcomes. Wire metric emission and structured WARN diagnostics on missing/invalid Cx propagation. Add regression tests and deterministic replay checks to ensure propagation failures are detected and surfaced automatically.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue structured acceptance_criteria field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Telemetry bridge defines and emits Cx propagation counters/histograms (including propagation-failure counter) with stable metric names and CI-visible export. 2. Unit/property tests validate propagation instrumentation across success/failure/cancellation paths and verify counter monotonicity plus trace-link integrity. 3. Deterministic end-to-end scenario script exercises async connection and transaction flows, proving propagation visibility and cancellation-safe cleanup with replayable commands. 4. Structured logging emits trace_id/run_id/scenario_id/policy_id/decision_id and actionable propagation-failure context, with CI log-schema conformance enforcement.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-14T04:40:00.110114538Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T09:14:11.753553680Z","closed_at":"2026-02-14T09:14:11.436041758Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["concurrency","ev-gated","frankensqlite","metrics","observability"],"comments":[{"id":2998,"issue_id":"bd-2g5.6.1","author":"PearlCastle","text":"Claimed. Starting observability plumbing for Cx propagation telemetry.","created_at":"2026-02-14T09:09:37Z"},{"id":2999,"issue_id":"bd-2g5.6.1","author":"PearlCastle","text":"Added CxPropagationMetrics to fsqlite-observability with 6 AtomicU64 counters: propagation_successes/failures, cancellation_cleanups, trace_linkages, cx_created, cancel_propagations. GLOBAL_CX_PROPAGATION_METRICS static. CxPropagationMetricsSnapshot with failure_ratio(), Display, Serialize. WARN-level tracing on propagation failures via record_propagation_failure(site). 7 new tests including concurrent safety (4-thread barrier). All 35 crate tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.","created_at":"2026-02-14T09:14:11Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2g5.7","title":"FrankenLab deterministic testing integration","description":"FrankenLab deterministic testing: Integrate with FrankenLab for deterministic scheduling of concurrent transactions. Virtual time for timeout-dependent logic. Trace replay for reproducing concurrency bugs. Fault injection via franken_fault crate. Tracing: span 'lab_schedule' with fields schedule_seed, thread_count, interleaving_id. Log level: DEBUG schedule decisions. Metric: fsqlite_lab_schedules_explored counter.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Deterministic replay reproduces same results. 2. Virtual time correctly advances. 3. Fault injection triggers all configured faults. 4. Schedule exploration covers > 1000 interleavings.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:07:51.571108238Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T00:37:05.287631643Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","concurrency","cross-crate","ev-gated","frankensqlite","impl"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2g5.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2g5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2g5.8","title":"Flat Combining for sequential batching under contention","description":"Flat Combining (§14.2): Sequential batching of operations under high contention. Single combiner thread processes batch of pending operations atomically. Reduces cache-line bouncing. For lock-contended hot spots (page latch, WAL append). Tracing: span 'flat_combine' with fields batch_size, combiner_thread, wait_time_us. Log level: DEBUG batch execution, INFO periodic contention stats. Metric: fsqlite_flat_combining_batch_size histogram, fsqlite_flat_combining_wait_seconds histogram.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Batch size > 1 under contention. 2. Throughput > individual locking under > 4 threads. 3. No starvation (bounded wait). 4. Correct results under stress.  8. Unit/property test coverage for this bead is mandatory, including deterministic seeds and explicit invariant checks. 9. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script must validate integrated behavior with replay instructions and archived artifacts. 10. Structured logging/metrics validation is required: trace/run/scenario IDs, timing, counters, and actionable failure context must be present and CI-verified.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:08:31.990626702Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T00:37:12.158461112Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien","alien-pass-2026-02-13","concurrency","ev-gated","frankensqlite","impl"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2g5.8","depends_on_id":"bd-2g5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2g5.8","depends_on_id":"bd-2g5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
